title: FutureCherry
body:
**Cherry Backport for Minecraft 1.16.5**

This mod brings most of the cherry features from newer Minecraft versions to 1.16.5, including:

*   **Cherry Grove Biome** – Including falling leaves particle and pink petals
*   **Complete Cherry Wood Set** – Logs, planks, sapling, door, fence(gate), and more (_excludes hanging sign and chest boat_)
*   **Faithful Gameplay** – All included cherry blocks and items function like their counterparts in newer vanilla Minecraft versions
